# Configuration files 

- Data contract config files for any data type.
eg. is the species manifest - the **single source of truth** for all species-specific logic.


Those YAML config files define: 
- header : 

- data contract (each data contract always requires a unique primary key)
    - data 
    - metadata eg. minimal set of metadata that will be provided (eg. by user)

- plotting defaults 
- specific plots to populate the dashboard (eg. for species-specific pipelines, but also for general pipelines where user can select among a list of config files)

Allows for for dynamic graph generation based on defaults settings.

Also also can be used for specific user selection without hardcoding specific logic for each species. #REVIEW (not sure if that means anyting anymore)


## Specifications
